title: T R U S T
quote: Radical honesty: give it, take it, get past it.

title: A U T H E N T I C I T Y
quote: Harmony of thought and word and deed.

title: C O U R A G E
quote: Don’t run away from challenges. Run over them.

title: R E S I L I E N C E
definitions: The word can’t is a lie.
quote: The biggest problem is thinking I shouldn’t have problems.

title: E X C E L L E N C E
definitions: Good is the enemy of great.
quote: The only sin is mediocrity.

title: G R O W T H
quote: When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.

title: E D U C A T I O N
quote: When I know better, I do better.

title: P R E P A R A T I O N
definitions: Overcome the obstacle before the obstacle.
quote: Tomorrow belongs to those who prepare today.

title: I N N O V A T I O N
quote: The world is changed by people crazy enough to think they can.

title: O W N E R S H I P
quote: The grass is green where I water it. (Don’t water the weeds.)

title: L E A D E R S H I P
quote: My people are winning, growing, and being heard.

title: T H R I F T
definitions: Do it right the first time.
Don't step over dollars for pennies.
quote: Work expands to fill the resources allotted for its completion.

title: S I M P L I C I T Y
quote: Get what I want by getting rid of what I don't.

title: G R A T I T U D E
quote: I may spoil what I have by desiring what I have not.

title: G U S T O
quote: I only live once. Done right, once is enough.

title: L E V I T Y
quote: I am most comical when I take myself too seriously.

title: H U M A N I T Y
quote: Do unto others as they would have me do unto them.

title: C O N N E C T I O N
quote: They remember 8% of what I say, and 100% of how I make them feel.

title: C O M M U N I C A T I O N
definitions: Talk when the ear is ready.
quote: Speak only if it improves upon the silence.

title: G I V I N G
definitions: It is in giving that I receive.
quote: Judge each day not by what I reap, but by what I sow.

title: S E R V I C E
quote: Give them what they won’t get anywhere else.

title: T E A M
quote: To go fast, I go alone. To go far, we go together.

title: W E L L N E S S
quote: Inspect all things which enter my body, my mind, and my heart.

title: M I N D F U L N E S S
quote: I improve the world around me when I improve the world within me.
